title: sphaeralcea floribunda
intro: Sphaeralcea floribunda, also known as the globemallow or desert mallow, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the mallow family and is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of sphaeralcea floribunda include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
